title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Speciality Restaurants Global Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Speciality Restaurants Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Speciality Restaurants Global Group in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Speciality Restaurants Global Group:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants Global Group!
